title: Circulation of Notification No. S.O. 715(E)
text: 3/23/2018 General Circular No: 21/2003 http://mca.gov.in/Ministry/circulars/cir2003/cir_30062003.html 1/1 General Circular No: 23/2003 No.1/8/2003-CL.V Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Company Affairs 5th floor, `A' Wing, Shastri Bhavan, Dr. R.P. Road, New Delhi. Dated: 30.06.2003 To All Regional Directors All Registrars of Companies Sir, I am directed to forward herewith a copy of the following Notification published in the Gazette of India for your information and necessary action:- Sl. No. No. and date of publication Subject 1. S.O. 715(E); 19.06.03 Effective date of sections 7, 11, 12 etc. of the Competition Act, 2002 - i.e. from 19.06.2003. 2. Please acknowledge the receipt. Yours faithfully, (N.K. Vig) Under Secretary to the Govt. of India Ph: 2338 7174 -- 1 of 1 --
